required_spec: 12 in diameter by about 6 in high; thickness close to 0.079 in; weldable low-carbon steel
search_terms: 12 inch steel hemisphere shell 14 gauge low carbon steel vessel blank
candidate_sources: metal supplier, fabrication shop, online metal spinner
substitution_policy: Substitute only after recalculating and measuring thickness
sourcing_risk: Unknown grade or forming stress changes tuning.

required_spec: Flat or formed steel compatible with tongue cutting and shell attachment
search_terms: 14 gauge mild steel sheet 0.075 0.080 low carbon
candidate_sources: local metal supplier, OnlineMetals, McMaster search
substitution_policy: Accept nearby gauge only with measured thickness update
